overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The character proceeds along a wet sidewalk past futuristic holographic advertisements and graffiti-covered walls, eventually reaching a wide intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside multi-lane street with graffiti wall

events.description: black sedan drives past on the street from right to left
dark SUV passes by on the street heading away from camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete building wall, heading toward distant neon-lit towers

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the multi-lane street past the character

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall running alongside the sidewalk with smooth texture
wall across the street with large yellow graffiti reading EL PADRE SABE
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and red neon vertical lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a tall building wall on the left and a multi-lane street on the right. Across the street, a wall features prominent yellow graffiti reading 'EL PADRE SABE' while cars occasionally pass by on the wet asphalt. The distant city skyline glows with neon lights from towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: passing Tom's Diner neon sign as the building facade changes to commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past storefronts and large digital advertisements on the right

entered.detail: circular neon sign with Tom's Diner text in white and red
concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance
tall building facades covered in bright cyan and red digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a Tom's Diner neon sign and building stairs on the left, while large cyan digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street. The graffiti wall falls behind as the street opens up to reveal more futuristic commercial buildings covered in glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and digital advertising towers

events.description: character stops at the intersection edge and looks around at the surroundings
character waits at crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: reaching the intersection, stopping at the curb, and looking around at the surrounding neon-lit buildings and traffic

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking on the opposite sidewalk across the wide intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crosswalk with red curb markings and metal grates
tall buildings covered in bright red and yellow vertical digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a wide intersection, stopping at the crosswalk to observe the traffic and surroundings. The scene opens up to show towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards displaying advertisements in bright cyan, red, and yellow. The character stands at the curb looking around the neon-drenched cityscape as the street widens significantly to accommodate multiple lanes of traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit urban corridor that gradually expands from a narrow sidewalk into a sprawling, luminous intersection. It begins with the character walking past a concrete wall and wet asphalt, where yellow graffiti reading 'EL PADRE SABE' stands out against the distant glow of the city skyline. As the character proceeds, the scene shifts past a Tom's Diner neon sign and building stairs, while the environment opens up to reveal large cyan digital billboards and futuristic commercial buildings. The movement finally culminates at a wide crosswalk, where the camera stops to reveal a massive, neon-drenched cityscape dominated by towering skyscrapers and vibrant advertisements in cyan, red, and yellow.
